title: 04267_APT_Adaptive_Pruning_and_Tuning_Pretrained_Language_Models_for_Efficient_Training_and_Inference
positive_examples: APT significantly reduces training and inference costs
contributes to lower resource consumption for a wide range of applications
could have a positive environmental impact
negative_examples: might lead to potential model misuse due to lower resource requirements
might inherit existing issues in language models, for example, biases in training data
